name: magic-patterns
description: Build high-fidelity Magic Patterns prototypes that match a real codebase using its tokens, Shadcn primitives, and data shapes.

interface.shortDescription: Prototype repo-faithful UI in Magic Patterns
interface.longDescription: Build and iterate Magic Patterns prototypes that match the user's real React, Tailwind, and Shadcn codebase by porting tokens, primitives, and realistic data into the generated design.
defaultPrompt: Prototype a feature that matches this app
Bump this Magic Patterns design to v2
Create a testable UI prototype from my repo
